chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI ITA No.37 of 1999 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES For hearing of case 11.11.2024 Mr. Shahrukh Naseem, Advocate for Appellant Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, Advocate for Respondent ************ Appellant’s Counsel, under instructions, does not press this Income Tax Appeal, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed along with pending application[s]. JUDGE JUDGE Qurban/PA*
